title: Introducing 123x Timetracker for monday.com
excerpt: We built 123x Timetracker to address the growing need for efficient and accurate time tracking within the monday.com ecosystem. As monday.com users ourselves, we found it challenging to manage time effectively across var…

posts.author: 123x (Prakash)
posts.cookedHtml:
We built 123x Timetracker to address the growing need for efficient and accurate time tracking within the monday.com ecosystem. As monday.com users ourselves, we found it challenging to manage time effectively across various projects and tasks. We wanted to create a solution that not only tracks time seamlessly but also integrates smoothly with the monday.com interface, providing a comprehensive time management tool for teams of all sizes.

123x Timetracker simplifies time tracking on monday.com with the following features:

  • Effortless Time Tracking: Track time from any workspace without hassle.
  • Comprehensive Views: Manage your time with monthly, weekly, daily, and timesheet views.
  • Team Management: Easily view your team’s time entries by grouping, filtering, reordering, and sorting.
  • Report Generation: Save and share reports with your team, either publicly or privately.

Example Use Cases and Workflows

Project Management Teams: Easily track the time spent on each task and project, ensuring accurate billing and efficient resource allocation. For example, a project manager can view a weekly timesheet to understand how team members are allocating their time across different projects.

Freelancers and Consultants: Keep detailed records of hours worked for multiple clients. A consultant can generate monthly reports to invoice clients accurately based on the time tracked within monday.com.

HR and Payroll: Simplify the payroll process by using timesheet views to calculate the exact hours worked by employees. HR managers can filter time entries to separate billable hours from non-billable ones.

Agile Development Teams: Track time spent on user stories and sprints to better estimate future work and manage team productivity. Scrum masters can reorder and sort time entries to align with their sprint retrospectives.

Why us

We are a dedicated team of developers and project managers who are passionate about optimizing workflow efficiency. We are proud to be official partners of monday.com, leveraging our expertise to create tools that enhance productivity and streamline processes for users worldwide.

Get Started Today!

Experience the simplicity and efficiency of 123x Timetracker for monday.com. Start tracking your time effortlessly and unlock the full potential of your team’s productivity. Install 123x Timetracker from the monday.com App Marketplace today!
